name: Asseco Business Solutions S.A.
summary: Asseco Business Solutions S.A. designs and develops enterprise software solutions in Poland and internationally. The company offers ERP systems to manage the key areas of the business; HRM applications to manage the human resources and payroll; SFA/FFA retail execution solutions to enable and facilitate mobile workforce management; commercial data exchange platform to swap data between manufacturers and their business partners; Factoring systems to manage the factoring transaction process; and Software for SMEs to manage small- and medium-sized business. Its solutions include Softlab ERP by Asseco and Macrologic ERP by Asseco; Omnichannel for FMCG, Mobile Touch by Asseco, and Connector by Asseco; and Faktor by Asseco. The company also provides IT outsourcing services, as well as sells and deploys central data processing systems. The company was founded in 2001 and is headquartered in Lublin, Poland.
